Build deterministic Go evidence to reconcile line admission, argument validation, registry lookup, and deterministic dispatch; the fixed PokéAPI origin and fair-use traffic budget must remain enforced; then inject one cache, waiter, goroutine, cancellation, or queue schedule and retain ownership evidence. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original fixtures only. Real PokéAPI traffic, DNS, sockets, TLS, host files, terminals, signals, race and leak claims, load, cross-platform packaging, accessibility review, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Test blank, known, aliased, unknown, malformed, EOF, and read-error cases with injected streams and exact outputs.

For Pokedex product engineering and Go Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Pokedex Go Dispatch Evidence, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Testing handlers directly proves stdin parsing and dispatch behavior.
